JS4401 Engineering Best 5
 Mathematics (x 1.75)
 M1 or M2 (x 1.75)
 Biology, Chemistry, Combined Science, Design and Applied Technology, Information and Communication Technology, Physics (x 1.5)
 Liberal Studies (x 0.5)

JS4428 BEng in Financial Technology Best 5
 English Language (x 1.25)
 Chinese Language (x 1.25)

 M1 or M2 (x 1.75)

JS4434 BEng in Electronic Engineering Best 5
 Mathematics (x 2)
 M1 or M2 (x 2)
 Chemistry, Physics (x 2)
 Biology, Combined Science, Design and Applied Technology, Information and Communication Technology (x 1.5)
 Liberal Studies (x 0.5)

 English Language (x 1.5)
 The best one subject of Mathematics or M1/M2 (x 1.5)
 Biology, Chemistry, Combined Science, Physics (x 1.5)

JS4462 BEng in Energy and Environmental
Engineering Best 5

 Liberal Studies (x 0.5)

replies.msg:
打埋場r6 先
General
Sem1
Math 1510 m2 + advance (pure math)
Phys 1003 for 冇讀phy or 2 below 當dse phy + 少少
Phys 1110 for 有讀過phys 唔熟m2+phy 嘅人會開始覺得慘慘豬 m2 d in 會應用
Engg 1110 C lang 學下用visual studio 寫c lang 通常寫下d mini game eg 2048
Engg 1100 整車 用adruno 焊野 3d print (你負責design 塊野咋 用autocad) 整架車 for 一個aim eg 行下路 / 射籃球 / 行迷宮


Engg 1410 matrix and vector m2 野 但深入好多 爛龜科 識人f 左兩次 差d 畢唔到業 冇錯呀 要同組仔個組仔個組仔一齊讀呀

差唔多
仲有d 濕鳩科eg 書通（睇college)
大通 ugfn ugfh 你問我都唔記得哂 呃你錢買書
Pe 睇你運動細胞搶
